# Third-party UI assets

- `Chartjs-LICENSE.md` accompanies the vendored `Chart.js` runtime copied from the official npm package `chart.js@4.5.1`.
- `OFL-1.1.txt` and `FragmentMono-NOTICE.txt` accompany the vendored `Fragment Mono` font used by the dashboard UI.
- The legacy `AWS Diatype Rounded Semi Mono` font files were removed from the runtime bundle because we could not verify an authoritative redistribution license/provenance for them.
